subtitle: Filter curated dramas by keyword, cast, original network, country, rating, episode count, aired year, and watched status.
keywordPlaceholder: Search title, Myanmar title, or character…
keywordHelp: Searches title, Myanmar title, and character name. Use Cast and Original Network filters for those fields.
castHelp: Type to search casts. Select one or more; filtering uses cast IDs.
originalNetworkHelp: Type to search networks. Select one or more; filtering uses network IDs.
countryHelp: Leave all unchecked to show dramas from every country. Select one or more to narrow results.
